Jávea · Mediterranean Estate

Finca
Matriz

A historic finca among ancient pine forests — for weddings, celebrations, and unhurried stays.

Book a Stay Enquire for Events

14 Guests
12 Hectares

12 mo Year-round

The Property

A place apart, rooted in history

Finca Matriz sits within a landscape of ancient pines and dry-stone walls, far from the noise. Built in the 18th century, the estate has been carefully restored to honour its Valencian heritage while welcoming guests and gatherings of all kinds — intimate or grand, quiet or celebratory.

The property spans over twelve hectares of Mediterranean scrubland, terraced gardens, and private pine forest — all framed by the warm stone of the original farmhouse.

aerial · the main house and courtyard
detail · stone archway

Spaces & Rooms

Tennis Court
Full size · floodlit · surrounded by pines

Celebrations

Unforgettable events

From intimate gatherings to full-property weddings, Finca Matriz offers a singular backdrop for moments that matter.

Weddings

Exclusive buy-outs for ceremonies and receptions up to 200 guests, surrounded by pine forests and candlelight.

Private Events

Corporate retreats, landmark birthdays, family reunions — tailored to your vision with full support from our team.

Cycling & Sport

Jávea's best cycling routes start at the door. Accommodations for groups with secure storage and guides available.

Vacation Rental

Rest here, linger longer

The residential wing — seven en-suite rooms, shared kitchen, courtyard and pool — sleeps up to 14 guests comfortably. Self-catering; bring your own rhythm.

7 en-suite bedrooms · king or queen beds · private bathrooms · fully equipped kitchen · pool 13m × 2.5m · tennis court · private parking · free WiFi

Low season (Nov–Apr) € 2,400 / night
High season (May–Oct) € 3,800 / night
Minimum stay 5 nights
Full-week rate on request
Buyout (events) on request

Check availability

Book directly via Lodgify. View live availability and reserve your dates.

Questions

Everything you need to know

The residential wing sleeps up to 14 guests across 7 en-suite rooms. Each room has its own private bathroom and sitting area. For cycling groups or larger events, the additional quarters can accommodate more guests.

The rental includes all 7 en-suite bedrooms, the fully equipped indoor kitchen, the communal living area, courtyard, pool, tennis court, terraces, and private parking. The property is self-catering — no staff or chef are included in the base rate, though we can connect you with local catering teams on request.

Ideally so. Jávea sits at the foot of Montgó National Park with exceptional road and mountain cycling on the doorstep. The finca has secure covered storage for bikes, a multi-purpose room for bike work and massage, private gated parking, and flexible twin/king room configurations for the whole team.

Very much. The vast garden is safe and open for children to explore freely. The pool has a shaded daybed area. There is also a washing machine on site.

The town and beaches of Jávea are a short drive away. Montgó Natural Park is right next door — ideal for hiking, cycling and wildlife. Local markets, restaurants and the historic old town are all within easy reach.

The pool is 13m × 2.5m, set within the central courtyard of the U-shaped house. It is surrounded by a stone terrace with a shaded daybed area, and has views directly into the main living rooms — designed for a seamless indoor-outdoor feel.

Yes. Sa Porquera is the beautifully restored historic wing of the finca — once the livestock quarters, now a characterful event space with high ceilings and original stone walls. It can host up to 80 guests for dinners, workshops, or private celebrations.

The entire estate can be closed with gates for full privacy. This makes it especially popular for cycling teams, corporate groups, and families who want the property to themselves.
